name: GOOD
description: A non-profit search engine donating all ad revenue to charity, built on Brave’s search index.
longDescription: GOOD, launched in 2022 in Berlin, Germany, is a non-profit search engine that directs 50% of its ad revenue to charitable causes. Built on Brave’s independent search index, it combines privacy with social impact, earning B Corp certification. GOOD targets users who want their searches to fund positive change, offering a simple interface and ethical mission as a European alternative.
